results.title: Google Translate

results.title: Hebrew Keyboard Online | Type in Hebrew for FREE! | מקלדת עברית

results.snippet: Morfix dictionary, the leading online Hebrew-English and English-Hebrew Dictionary, free translation, with audio pronunciation, inflections, synonyms, example sentences, Hebrew Nikud (punctuation), …

results.snippet: Click the Virtual Keyboard above OR just type on your Physical Keyboard! Think aleph sounds like "a"? Try it. Gimel sounds like "g"? You guessed it again. you guess the rest! Type the wrong letter? …

results.title: Text reverse for Hebrew - Eliram
results.snippet: Write in the Input box, move the cursor to the Reverse box to see the result. Use CTRL + RIGHT-SHIFT to align text to the right. Do not reverse Numbers! Do not reverse Dots, Slashes, Colons & Dashes …
